title: National Power Plant Failure
description: A major power plant suffers a catastrophic malfunction, causing rolling blackouts across multiple states.

C.title: Let local authorities handle the crisis

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Emergency generators restore stability immediately. Blackouts create chaos.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Generators are temporary. Fast-tracked repairs solve the root problem.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Temporary solutions buy time. We can’t leave millions in the dark.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: But relying on temporary fixes delays real progress.
